subject: International Expansion Financial Analysis - Japan Market
body:
Strategy Team,

Financial analysis for Japan market entry:

Market Opportunity:
- TAM: $2.4B (growing 28% annually)
- Serviceable market: $180M
- Year 3 revenue target: $8M ARR

Investment Required:
- Year 1: $2.8M (office setup, 12 hires, localization)
- Year 2: $3.5M (team expansion to 25, marketing ramp)
- Year 3: $2.1M (steady state operations)
- Total 3-year investment: $8.4M

Financial Projections:
- Break-even: Month 28
- Year 3 EBITDA margin: 12%
- Year 3 customer count: 85
- Average ACV in Japan: $94K (premium to US due to customization)

Key Risks:
- Localization costs 40% higher than estimated for EU expansion
- Sales cycle 2x longer than US (6-8 months vs 3-4 months)
- Requires local data center (additional $400K/year)
- Currency risk: JPY has depreciated 15% vs USD in past year

Recommendation: Proceed with a smaller initial team (6 people) and partner-led go-to-market to reduce upfront investment to $1.5M.
